meta.title: Secure Authorization Of ECU Privileges In Automobiles
meta.description: Automobiles have numerous Electronic Control Units (ECU), each with its own function. ECUs need to communicate with the external world and sometimes be remotely commanded. This communication over a car's "network" requires security controls as any network does. In this session Paul will describe a method to secure the access to key privileges in ECUs such as reprograming, reconfiguration, etc.
